1. 购物车控制器

1.1. 获取购物车列表

URL: http://127.0.0.1:8901/cart

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: 获取购物车列表

Query-parameters:

ParameterValueTypeRequiredDescription

userId

string

true

No comments found.

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

code

int32

响应状态码 对应ResultCode枚举

-

success

boolean

响应状态 true: 成功, false: 失败

-

int32

-

message

string

响应消息

-

data

array

int64

string

curl -X GET -i 'http://127.0.0.1:8901/cart?userId='

  "orderId": 0,
  "productId": 0,
  "userId": "",
  "userName": "",
  "userAvatar": "",
  "rating": 0,
  "content": "",
  "images": [
    ""
  ],
  "anonymous": 0,
  "likeCount": 0,
  "status": 0,
  "reply": "",
  "createdAt": "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"
}'

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

code

int32

响应状态码 对应ResultCode枚举

-

success

boolean

-

httpStatus

int32

message

string

响应消息

-

data

object

响应数据

└─id

int64

商家ID

-

└─userId

string

用户ID

-

└─storeName

string

店铺名称

-

└─storeLogo

string

-

└─storeBanner

string

店铺横幅

-

└─storeDescription

string

-

string

店铺类型

-

└─category

array

主营类目

-

└─contactName

string

联系人

-

└─contactPhone

string

联系电话

-

└─contactEmail

string

联系邮箱

-

number

-

└─sales

-

└─followers

traceId

string

请求路径

string

请求方法

总记录数

int32

当前页码

-

pageSize

int32

每页大小

-

totalPages

int32

总页数

object

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

fieldErrors

object

错误字段 用于参数校验错误，key为字段名，value为错误信息

-

string

异常类型

string

bizCode

string

-

extras

object

└─any object

object

any object.

costTime

int64

响应耗时(毫秒)

-

{"code":0,"success":true,"httpStatus":0,"message":"","data":{"id":0,"userId":"","storeName":"","storeLogo":"","storeBanner":"","storeDescription":"","storeType":"","category":[""],"contactName":"","contactPhone":"","contactEmail":"","rating":0,"sales":0,"followers":0,"status":0,"auditStatus":0},"timestamp":"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss","traceId":"","path":"","method":"","total":0,"pageNum":0,"pageSize":0,"totalPages":0,"errors":{"mapKey":{}},"fieldErrors":{"mapKey":},"exceptionType":"","stackTraceId":"","bizCode":"","extras":{"mapKey":{}},"costTime":0}

{"code":0,"success":true,"httpStatus":0,"message":"","data":{"totalPages":0,"totalElements":0,"size":0,"content":[{"id":0,"userId":"","storeName":"","storeLogo":"","storeBanner":"","storeDescription":"","storeType":"","category":[""],"contactName":"","contactPhone":"","contactEmail":"","rating":0,"sales":0,"followers":0,"status":0,"auditStatus":0}],"number":0,"sort":{"empty":true,"orders":[{"object":"any object"}]},"numberOfElements":0,"pageable":{"offset":0,"sort":{"empty":true,"orders":[{"object":"any object"}]},"pageSize":0,"pageNumber":0,"unpaged":true,"paged":true},"first":true,"last":true,"empty":true},"timestamp":"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss","traceId":"","path":"","method":"","total":0,"pageNum":0,"pageSize":0,"totalPages":0,"errors":{"mapKey":{}},"fieldErrors":{"mapKey":},"exceptionType":"","stackTraceId":"","bizCode":"","extras":{"mapKey":{}},"costTime":0}

Curl-example:

curl -X GET -i 'http://127.0.0.1:8901/admin/merchants/by-category?pageNum=1&pageSize=10&category=' --data '&"1"&"10"'

5. 优惠券控制器

5.1. 获取优惠券列表

URL: http://127.0.0.1:8901/coupons

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: 获取优惠券列表

Query-parameters:

ParameterValueTypeRequiredDescription

merchantId

int64

false

No comments found.

status

int32

false

No comments found.

pageNum

int32

true

No comments found.

pageSize

int32

true

No comments found.

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

code

int32

响应状态码 对应ResultCode枚举

-

success

boolean

响应状态 true: 成功, false: 失败

-

httpStatus

int32

HTTP状态码 用于HTTP响应状态

-

message

string

响应消息

-

data

object

响应数据

-

└─totalPages

int32

No comments found.

-

└─totalElements

int64

No comments found.

-

└─size

int32

No comments found.

-

└─content

array

No comments found.

number

int32

string

-

timestamp

string

响应时间戳

-

traceId

string

请求追踪ID 用于日志追踪和问题排查

-

path

string

请求路径

-

method

string

请求方法

-

total

int64

总记录数

-

pageNum

int32

当前页码

-

pageSize

int32

每页大小

-

totalPages

int32

总页数

-

errors

object

错误详情 包含更详细的错误信息，用于调试

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

fieldErrors

object

错误字段 用于参数校验错误，key为字段名，value为错误信息

-

exceptionType

string

异常类型

-

stackTraceId

string

堆栈跟踪ID 当发生异常时，生成唯一ID用于关联日志

-

bizCode

string

业务状态码 用于更细粒度的业务状态标识

-

extras

object

附加数据 用于传递额外的业务数据

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

costTime

int64

响应耗时(毫秒)

-

Response-example:

5.2. 获取可用优惠券

URL: http://127.0.0.1:8901/coupons/available

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: 获取可用优惠券

Query-parameters:

ParameterValueTypeRequiredDescription

userId

string

true

No comments found.

orderAmount

number

true

No comments found.

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

code

int32

响应状态码 对应ResultCode枚举

-

success

boolean

响应状态 true: 成功, false: 失败

-

httpStatus

int32

HTTP状态码 用于HTTP响应状态

-

message

string

响应消息

-

data

array

响应数据

string

└─endTime

string

string

分类ID（JSON数组）

string

int32

totalPages

int32

总页数

-

errors

object

错误详情 包含更详细的错误信息，用于调试

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

fieldErrors

object

错误字段 用于参数校验错误，key为字段名，value为错误信息

-

exceptionType

string

异常类型

-

stackTraceId

string

堆栈跟踪ID 当发生异常时，生成唯一ID用于关联日志

-

bizCode

string

业务状态码 用于更细粒度的业务状态标识

-

extras

object

附加数据 用于传递额外的业务数据

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

costTime

int64

响应耗时(毫秒)

Curl-example:

curl -X GET -i 'http://127.0.0.1:8901/coupons/available?orderAmount=0&userId=' --data '&0'

5.3. 获取优惠券详情

URL: http://127.0.0.1:8901/coupons/{couponId}

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: 获取优惠券详情

Path-parameters:

ParameterValueTypeRequiredDescription

couponId

int64

true

No comments found.

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

code

int32

响应状态码 对应ResultCode枚举

-

success

boolean

响应状态 true: 成功, false: 失败

-

httpStatus

int32

HTTP状态码 用于HTTP响应状态

-

message

string

响应消息

-

data

object

                    └─value

string

规格值

-

                    └─sort

int32

排序

-

└─name

string

优惠券名称

-

└─type

int32

类型：0-满减，1-折扣

-

└─value

number

面值/折扣

-

└─minAmount

number

最低消费

-

└─maxDiscount

number

最高优惠

-

└─totalCount

int32

发放总量

-

└─receiveCount

int32

已领取数量

-

└─usedCount

int32

已使用数量

-

└─limitPerUser

int32

每人限领

-

└─startTime

string

开始时间

-

└─endTime

string

结束时间

-

└─validDays

int32

领取后天数

-

└─scope

string

使用范围：all-全场，category-分类，product-商品

-

└─categoryIds

string

分类ID（JSON数组）

-

└─productIds

string

商品ID（JSON数组）

-

└─status

int32

状态：0-禁用，1-启用

-

timestamp

string

响应时间戳

-

traceId

string

请求追踪ID 用于日志追踪和问题排查

-

path

string

请求路径

-

method

string

请求方法

-

total

int64

总记录数

-

pageNum

int32

Curl-example:

curl -X GET -i 'http://127.0.0.1:8901/coupons/{couponId}'

5.4. 领取优惠券

URL: http://127.0.0.1:8901/coupons/{couponId}/receive

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: 领取优惠券

Path-parameters:

ParameterValueTypeRequiredDescription

couponId

int64

true

No comments found.

Body-parameters:

ParameterValueTypeRequiredDescription

userId

string

true

No comments found.

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

code

int32

响应状态码 对应ResultCode枚举

-

success

boolean

响应状态 true: 成功, false: 失败

-

httpStatus

int32

HTTP状态码 用于HTTP响应状态

-

message

string

响应消息

-

data

boolean

响应数据

-

timestamp

string

响应时间戳

-

traceId

string

请求追踪ID 用于日志追踪和问题排查

-

path

string

请求路径

-

method

string

请求方法

-

total

int64

总记录数

-

pageNum

int32

当前页码

-

pageSize

int32

-

totalPages

int32

-

object

object

any object.

object

string

异常类型

-

stackTraceId

string

堆栈跟踪ID 当发生异常时，生成唯一ID用于关联日志

-

bizCode

string

业务状态码 用于更细粒度的业务状态标识

-

extras

object

附加数据 用于传递额外的业务数据

-

└─any object

object

any object.

costTime

int64

响应耗时(毫秒)

8. 商品控制器

8.1. 分页查询商品

URL: http://127.0.0.1:8901/products

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: 分页查询商品

Query-parameters:

ParameterValueTypeRequiredDescription

keyword

string

false

关键字

categoryId

int64

false

分类ID

brandId

int64

false

品牌ID

merchantId

int64

false

商家ID

minPrice

number

false

价格区间-最低价

maxPrice

number

false

价格区间-最高价

rating

int32

false

评分

isHot

int32

false

是否热卖：0-全部，1-热卖

isFeatured

int32

false

是否精选：0-全部，1-精选

isNew

int32

false

是否新品：0-全部，1-新品

publishStatus

int32

false

上架状态

sortField

string

false

排序字段：price-价格，sales-销量，rating-评分，createdAt-创建时间

sortOrder

string

false

排序方式：asc-升序，desc-降序

pageNum

int32

false

页码

pageSize

int32

false

每页数量

8.10. 创建商品

URL: http://127.0.0.1:8901/products

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 创建商品

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeRequiredDescription

name

string

true

No comments found. Validation[Size(max=200, message=商品名称不能超过200个字符) ]

subName

string

false

No comments found. Validation[Size(max=200, message=副标题不能超过200个字符) ]

categoryId

int64

true

No comments found.

image

string

false

No comments found.

images

object

false

No comments found.

price

number

true

No comments found. Validation[DecimalMin(value=0.01, message=价格必须大于0); Digits(integer=8, fraction=2, message=价格格式不正确) ]

originalPrice

number

false

No comments found. Validation[DecimalMin(value=0.01, message=原价必须大于0); Digits(integer=8, fraction=2, message=原价格式不正确) ]

costPrice

number

false

No comments found. Validation[DecimalMin(value=0.01, message=成本价必须大于0); Digits(integer=8, fraction=2, message=成本价格式不正确) ]

stock

int32

true

No comments found. Validation[Min(value=0, message=库存不能小于0) ]

description

string

false

No comments found.

detail

string

false

No comments found.

isHot

int32

false

No comments found.

isFeatured

int32

false

No comments found.

isNew

int32

false

No comments found.

publishStatus

int32

11.9. 设置默认收货地址

URL: http://127.0.0.1:8901/users/addresses/{addressId}/default

Type: PUT

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: 设置默认收货地址
